tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Estate Tax Calculator.

gross_estate_value.label: Gross Estate Value
gross_estate_value.helper: Total fair market value of all assets owned at death, including real estate, investments, and personal property.

debts_and_expenses.label: Debts and Expenses
debts_and_expenses.helper: Outstanding debts, funeral costs, and administrative expenses deductible from the gross estate.

marital_deduction.label: Marital Deduction
marital_deduction.helper: Value of assets passing to a surviving spouse, deductible from the taxable estate.

charitable_deduction.label: Charitable Deduction
charitable_deduction.helper: Value of assets bequeathed to qualified charities, deductible from the taxable estate.

state_death_tax_credit.label: State Death Tax Credit
state_death_tax_credit.helper: Credit for state-level estate or inheritance taxes paid, reducing federal estate tax liability.

applicable_exclusion_amount.label: Applicable Exclusion Amount
applicable_exclusion_amount.helper: Lifetime estate tax exemption amount (2023 federal level), indexed for inflation.

tax_rate.label: Tax Rate
tax_rate.helper: Maximum federal estate tax rate applied to taxable estate above the exclusion amount.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment ($)
initialinvestment.helper: Enter the total amount of money you plan to invest initially in the ETF. This is not financial advice; past performance does not guarantee future results.

monthlycontribution.label: Monthly Contribution ($)
monthlycontribution.helper: Enter the amount you plan to add each month. Regular contributions can help build wealth over time, but this is not a guarantee of returns.

annualreturnrate.label: Expected Annual Return Rate (%)
annualreturnrate.helper: Enter the expected average annual return rate. This is a hypothetical assumption; actual returns may vary significantly.

years.label: Investment Period (Years)
years.helper: Enter the number of years you plan to hold the investment. Longer periods may allow compounding to work, but involve more uncertainty.

expenseratio.label: ETF Expense Ratio (%)
expenseratio.helper: Enter the annual expense ratio of the ETF. This fee reduces your returns; lower expense ratios generally benefit long-term investors.

itemprice.label: Item Price ($)
itemprice.helper: Enter the price you charge for the item before any fees.

shippingcost.label: Shipping Cost ($)
shippingcost.helper: Enter the amount you charge the buyer for shipping.

costofgoods.label: Cost of Goods ($)
costofgoods.helper: Enter the total cost to produce or acquire the item (materials, labor, etc.).

quantity.label: Quantity Sold
quantity.helper: Enter the number of items sold in this transaction.

net_income.helper: Net income is the starting point for FCFE calculation, representing profit after taxes and interest.

depreciation_amortization.label: Depreciation & Amortization
depreciation_amortization.helper: Non-cash expenses added back to net income to reflect cash available to equity holders.

capex.label: Capital Expenditures
capex.helper: Cash used to acquire or maintain fixed assets, reducing free cash flow to equity.

change_in_working_capital.label: Change in Working Capital
change_in_working_capital.helper: Increase in working capital consumes cash, decrease releases cash; affects FCFE.

net_borrowing.label: Net Borrowing
net_borrowing.helper: New debt issued minus debt repaid; positive net borrowing increases cash available to equity.

ebit.label: EBIT
ebit.helper: Earnings Before Interest and Taxes, representing operating profitability.

tax_rate.label: Tax Rate
tax_rate.helper: Effective corporate tax rate applied to EBIT.

depreciation.label: Depreciation & Amortization
depreciation.helper: Non-cash charges that reduce taxable income but not cash flow.

capex.label: Capital Expenditures
capex.helper: Funds used to acquire or upgrade physical assets such as property, buildings, or equipment.

change_in_working_capital.label: Change in Working Capital
change_in_working_capital.helper: Increase in net working capital reduces free cash flow; decrease adds to it.

currentage.label: Current Age
currentage.helper: Enter your current age. This is used to calculate years to retirement and life expectancy. Not financial advice.

retirementage.label: Retirement Age
retirementage.helper: Enter the age at which you plan to retire. Used to determine saving period. Not financial advice.

currentsavings.label: Current Savings
currentsavings.helper: Enter your total current savings and investments. This is the starting capital. Not financial advice.

annualcontribution.label: Annual Contribution
annualcontribution.helper: Enter the amount you plan to save and invest each year until retirement. Not financial advice.

expectedreturn.label: Expected Annual Return
expectedreturn.helper: Enter the expected average annual return on your investments (e.g., 7% for stock market). Not financial advice.

annualexpenses.label: Annual Expenses in Retirement
annualexpenses.helper: Enter your estimated annual expenses during retirement. Used to calculate the nest egg needed. Not financial advice.

static_pressure.label: Static Pressure
static_pressure.helper: Measured at hydrant outlet with no flow. Used to determine available system pressure per NFPA 291.

residual_pressure.label: Residual Pressure
residual_pressure.helper: Pressure measured while hydrant is flowing at test rate. Indicates system capacity under demand.

flow_rate_test.label: Test Flow Rate
flow_rate_test.helper: Flow rate measured during hydrant flow test using pitot gauge or flow meter.

pipe_diameter.label: Supply Pipe Diameter
pipe_diameter.helper: Nominal diameter of the main supply pipe feeding the hydrant. Affects friction loss.

pipe_length.label: Supply Pipe Length
pipe_length.helper: Distance from water main to hydrant. Used in friction loss calculations.

hazen_williams_coefficient.label: Hazen-Williams C Factor
hazen_williams_coefficient.helper: Pipe roughness coefficient. 140 for new steel, 100 for old cast iron. Per ISO 10803 and NFPA 13.

elevation_difference.label: Elevation Difference
elevation_difference.helper: Height difference between water source and hydrant. Positive if hydrant is above source.

number_of_hydrants.label: Number of Hydrants in Test
number_of_hydrants.placeholder: Enter number of hydrants in test
number_of_hydrants.helper: Number of hydrants flowing simultaneously during test. Affects total demand.

hydrant_type.label: Hydrant Type
hydrant_type.helper: Type of hydrant per NFPA 291. Dry barrel common in cold climates.

flow_condition.label: Flow Condition
flow_condition.helper: Steady for normal tests, Transient for surge analysis per ISO 4126.

is_test_standard.label: NFPA 291 Compliant Test
is_test_standard.helper: Indicates if flow test was performed per NFPA 291 standard procedures.

wholenumber.label: Whole Number (for mixed fractions)
wholenumber.helper: Integer part of a mixed number (e.g., 3 in 3 1/4). Set to 0 for proper fractions.

decimalplaces.label: Decimal Places (precision)
decimalplaces.helper: Number of decimal places for the result. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

roundingmethod.label: Rounding Method
roundingmethod.helper: Rounding rule per ISO 80000-1 (half_even recommended for statistical work).

uncertaintyinput.label: Measurement Uncertainty (±)
uncertaintyinput.helper: Absolute uncertainty in the numerator (e.g., from measurement tolerance). Used for Six Sigma uncertainty propagation.

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Fractional Odds Calculator.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment ($)
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront cost including franchise fee, equipment, and build-out. This is not financial advice.

annualrevenue.label: Annual Revenue ($)
annualrevenue.helper: Projected gross revenue for the first year. This is not financial advice.

annualexpenses.label: Annual Expenses ($)
annualexpenses.helper: Total annual operating costs including rent, payroll, and royalties. This is not financial advice.

royaltyrate.label: Royalty Rate (%)
royaltyrate.helper: Percentage of revenue paid to franchisor. This is not financial advice.

loaninterestrate.label: Loan Interest Rate (%)
loaninterestrate.helper: Annual interest rate on borrowed capital. This is not financial advice.

loantermyears.label: Loan Term (years)
loantermyears.helper: Duration of the loan in years. This is not financial advice.

operatingcashflow.label: Operating Cash Flow
operatingcashflow.helper: Cash generated from core business operations. Not medical/legal advice.

capitalexpenditures.label: Capital Expenditures
capitalexpenditures.helper: Funds used to acquire or upgrade physical assets. Not medical/legal advice.

billablehoursperweek.helper: The number of hours per week you can actually bill clients, excluding administrative tasks.

vacationweeks.label: Vacation Weeks per Year
vacationweeks.helper: Number of weeks you take off per year (unpaid).

overheadpercent.label: Overhead Percentage
overheadpercent.helper: Percentage of income that goes to business expenses (software, taxes, insurance, etc.).

employer_contribution.label: Employer Contribution ($)

tax_rate.label: Marginal Tax Rate (%)
tax_rate.helper: Your marginal income tax rate (federal + state). HSA contributions are tax-deductible, so this rate determines your tax savings.

medical_expenses.label: Annual Medical Expenses ($)
medical_expenses.helper: Your expected out-of-pocket medical expenses for the year. HSA funds can be used tax-free for qualified medical expenses.

investment_return.label: Expected Annual Return (%)
investment_return.helper: If you invest your HSA funds, the expected annual return. HSA investments grow tax-free.

years.label: Number of Years
years.helper: How many years you plan to contribute and invest in your HSA. Longer time horizons increase the benefit of tax-free growth.

annual_demand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annual_demand.helper: Total forecasted demand for the SKU over one year. Used to calculate order frequency and cycle stock.

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Cost per Order ($)
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed cost per purchase order (setup, administrative, freight). Influences EOQ and total logistics cost.

holding_cost_per_unit.label: Holding Cost per Unit per Year ($)
holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Enter holding cost per unit per year ($)
holding_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost to hold one unit in inventory for one year (storage, insurance, obsolescence). Key for inventory carrying cost.

unit_cost.label: Unit Cost ($)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase cost per unit from supplier. Used in total cost calculations and MOQ financial impact.

moq.label: Minimum Order Quantity (units)
moq.helper: Supplier-imposed minimum batch size. If EOQ < MOQ, order quantity must be adjusted upward, increasing holding cost.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Time (days)
lead_time_days.helper: Time from order placement to receipt. Used for safety stock calculation and reorder point.

demand_std_dev.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units/day)
demand_std_dev.helper: Daily demand variability. Critical for safety stock under Six Sigma service levels.

service_level.label: Service Level (%)
service_level.helper: Desired probability of not stocking out during lead time. Used to derive z-score for safety stock.

days_per_year.label: Operating Days per Year
days_per_year.helper: Number of days the facility operates. Converts annual demand to daily demand.

storage_capacity.label: Storage Capacity (units)
storage_capacity.helper: Maximum inventory the warehouse can physically hold. Constraint for feasible order quantity.

backorder_cost_per_unit.label: Backorder Cost per Unit ($)
backorder_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost per unit of unmet demand (lost sales, penalty, expediting). Used in total cost trade-off.

supplier_reliability.label: Supplier Reliability Factor
supplier_reliability.helper: Probability that supplier delivers on time. Adjusts safety stock for lead time variability (Lean JIT).

inventory_policy.label: Inventory Policy
inventory_policy.helper: Review method: continuous (Q,R) or periodic (P,T). Affects safety stock formula.

use_moq_override.label: Force MOQ Compliance
use_moq_override.helper: If true, order quantity is rounded up to MOQ when EOQ < MOQ. If false, EOQ is used even if below MOQ (may violate supplier terms).

closing_costs.label: Closing Costs

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned operating hours of the equipment per year. Used to calculate failure frequency and downtime.

number_of_units.label: Number of Units
number_of_units.helper: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.

mtbf.label: Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
mtbf.helper: Average time between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.

mttr.label: Mean Time To Repair (MTTR)
mttr.helper: Average time to restore a failed system to operational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.

cost_per_downtime_hour.label: Cost per Downtime Hour
cost_per_downtime_hour.helper: Lost profit or cost incurred per hour of equipment downtime (lost production, labor, penalties).

cost_per_failure_event.label: Cost per Failure Event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.placeholder: Enter cost per failure event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.helper: Fixed costs per failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.

maintenance_labor_rate.label: Maintenance Labor Rate
maintenance_labor_rate.helper: Hourly cost of maintenance personnel (including overhead).

reliability_improvement_investment.label: Reliability Improvement Investment (annual)
reliability_improvement_investment.helper: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).

availability_target.label: Availability Target
availability_target.helper: Target operational availability (uptime / total time). Used for gap analysis.

industry_benchmark_mtbf.label: Industry Benchmark MTBF
industry_benchmark_mtbf.helper: Reference MTBF from industry standards (e.g., WERC, ISO) for comparison.

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for MTTR Calculator.

material_cost_per_unit.label: Material Cost per Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct material cost per unit of product, including raw materials and purchased components.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Cost per Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average fully burdened labor cost per hour for direct operators.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Rate
overhead_rate.helper: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (ISO 9001 cost accounting).

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate
defect_rate.helper: Percentage of units produced that are defective and require rework or scrap (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_time_per_unit.label: Rework Time per Unit
rework_time_per_unit.helper: Average time spent reworking a defective unit.

scrap_rate.label: Scrap Rate
scrap_rate.helper: Percentage of defective units that are scrapped (cannot be reworked).

waiting_time_per_unit.label: Waiting Time per Unit
waiting_time_per_unit.helper: Average idle time per unit due to bottlenecks, material shortages, or equipment downtime (Lean Takt time analysis).

excess_motion_cost_per_unit.label: Excess Motion Cost per Unit
excess_motion_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Enter excess motion cost per unit
excess_motion_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of unnecessary worker movement (walking, reaching) per unit, based on time-motion studies.

inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.label: Inventory Holding Cost per Unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Enter inventory holding cost per unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of holding one unit in inventory per year (WERC DC Metrics).

overproduction_quantity.label: Overproduction Quantity
overproduction_quantity.helper: Number of units produced beyond customer demand (Muda of overproduction).

transportation_cost_per_unit.label: Transportation Cost per Unit
transportation_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of moving materials or products between processes (Lean waste of transportation).

processing_waste_per_unit.label: Processing Waste per Unit
processing_waste_per_unit.helper: Cost of unnecessary processing steps or non-value-added operations.

production_volume.label: Production Volume
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the analysis period.

shift_hours_per_day.label: Shift Hours per Day
shift_hours_per_day.helper: Number of operating hours per shift.

working_days_per_year.label: Working Days per Year
working_days_per_year.helper: Number of working days per year.

industry_type.helper: Industry sector for benchmarking and threshold adjustment.

include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, includes intangible losses such as lost opportunity cost and brand damage.

elevation_change.label: Elevation Change

flow_regime.label: Flow Regime Assumption

employer_tax_rate.label: Employer Tax Rate
employer_tax_rate.helper: The percentage of wages paid by the employer for Social Security. Typically matches the employee rate.

wage_base_limit.label: Wage Base Limit
wage_base_limit.helper: Maximum annual earnings subject to Social Security tax. Earnings above this limit are not taxed. 2024 limit is $168,600.

growthrate.helper: Annual revenue growth rate as a percentage. High growth typically commands higher multiples.

grossmargin.helper: Gross profit as a percentage of revenue. Higher margins often lead to higher valuations.

marketsize.label: Total Addressable Market ($)
marketsize.helper: Total revenue opportunity if the startup captures 100% of its target market. Larger TAM can support higher valuations.

burnrate.label: Monthly Burn Rate ($)
burnrate.helper: Monthly cash spent by the startup. Lower burn rate relative to revenue indicates efficiency.

thickness_m.label: Thickness
thickness_m.helper: Material thickness in the direction of heat flow. Used for thermal resistance calculation.

cross_section_area_m2.label: Cross-Sectional Area

heat_flow_w.label: Heat Flow Rate

temperature_delta_k.label: Temperature Difference
temperature_delta_k.helper: Temperature gradient across the material thickness. Drives conductive heat transfer.

moisture_content_pct.label: Moisture Content

aging_factor.label: Aging Factor
aging_factor.helper: Multiplier accounting for material degradation over time. Based on Six Sigma aging studies.

measurement_confidence.label: Measurement Confidence

weld_type.label: Weld Type
weld_type.helper: Determines the geometry factor and stress distribution model per AWS D1.1.

base_material_yield_strength.label: Base Material Yield Strength
base_material_yield_strength.helper: Yield strength of the weaker base material (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).

weld_material_tensile_strength.label: Weld Material Tensile Strength
weld_material_tensile_strength.helper: Tensile strength of filler metal (e.g., ER70S-6).

throat_thickness.label: Effective Throat Thickness
throat_thickness.helper: Minimum throat dimension per ISO 5817 quality level B.

weld_length.label: Weld Length
weld_length.helper: Total length of the weld seam.

applied_load.label: Applied Load
applied_load.helper: Service load acting on the weld joint.

load_angle.label: Load Angle (from weld axis)
load_angle.helper: Angle between applied load and weld longitudinal axis. 90° = transverse, 0° = longitudinal.

quality_level.label: Quality Level (ISO 5817)
quality_level.helper: ISO 5817 weld quality level: B=stringent, C=moderate, D=basic.

inspection_method.label: Inspection Method
inspection_method.helper: NDT method used; affects confidence factor.

is_fatigue_loading.label: Fatigue Loading
is_fatigue_loading.helper: If true, applies S-N curve reduction per AWS D1.1 fatigue categories.

joint_type.label: Joint Type
joint_type.helper: Select the weld joint geometry per ISO 9692. Affects volume calculation formula.

plate_thickness.label: Plate Thickness (t)
plate_thickness.helper: Thickness of the base metal. Critical for groove volume calculation.

root_face.label: Root Face (f)
root_face.helper: Land at the root of the groove. Affects effective depth.

root_gap.label: Root Gap (g)
root_gap.helper: Gap between plates at root. Increases weld volume.

groove_angle.label: Groove Angle (α)
groove_angle.helper: Included angle of V-groove. Standard range per AWS D1.1.

weld_length.label: Weld Length (L)
weld_length.helper: Total length of the weld seam.

leg_length.label: Leg Length (for fillet)
leg_length.helper: Fillet weld leg size. Only used when joint_type = fillet.

weld_process.label: Welding Process
weld_process.helper: Select the welding process. Affects deposition efficiency and labor rate.

material_density.label: Material Density
material_density.helper: Density of weld metal. Steel ~7.85, Aluminum ~2.7, Stainless ~8.0.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate
labor_rate.helper: Hourly cost of welder including overhead.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Rate
overhead_rate.helper: Percentage added to direct labor for indirect costs.

consumable_cost_per_kg.label: Consumable Cost per kg
consumable_cost_per_kg.helper: Cost of filler metal per kilogram.

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited metal to consumed filler. Varies by process: SMAW~65%, GMAW~90%, FCAW~85%, SAW~99%, GTAW~95%.

operator_factor.label: Operator Factor
operator_factor.helper: Percentage of total time that the welder is actually depositing metal. Typical range 20-50%.

weld_speed.label: Weld Speed
weld_speed.helper: Travel speed of the welding arc. Affects deposition rate and time.

wire_feed_speed.label: Wire Feed Speed (if applicable)
wire_feed_speed.helper: Only for GMAW/FCAW processes. Used to calculate deposition rate.

wire_diameter.label: Wire Diameter
wire_diameter.helper: Diameter of filler wire. Affects cross-sectional area and deposition rate.

use_premium_data.label: Use Premium Data (historical trends)
use_premium_data.helper: If true, adjusts deposition efficiency and operator factor based on historical data from premium database.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Welding Calculator.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Welding Calculator.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Welding Calculator.

weld_length_mm.label: Weld Length (mm)
weld_length_mm.helper: Total length of the weld joint to be deposited.

weld_throat_mm.label: Weld Throat Thickness (mm)
weld_throat_mm.helper: Effective throat thickness of the fillet or groove weld.

material_density_g_per_cm3.label: Material Density (g/cm³)
material_density_g_per_cm3.helper: Density of the base and filler material (typical steel ~7.85).

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency (%)
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited weld metal to total filler metal consumed (includes spatter and losses).

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Rate (USD/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor cost for welder.

welding_speed_mm_per_min.label: Welding Speed (mm/min)
welding_speed_mm_per_min.helper: Travel speed of the welding torch along the joint.

filler_wire_cost_per_kg.label: Filler Wire Cost (USD/kg)
filler_wire_cost_per_kg.helper: Cost per kilogram of filler wire or electrode.

gas_cost_per_liter.label: Shielding Gas Cost (USD/L)
gas_cost_per_liter.helper: Cost per liter of shielding gas (e.g., Argon/CO2 mix).

gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.label: Gas Flow Rate (L/min)
gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.helper: Flow rate of shielding gas during welding.

welding_power_kw.label: Welding Power (kW)
welding_power_kw.helper: Average power consumption of the welding machine during operation.

overhead_rate_per_hour.label: Overhead Rate (USD/hour)
overhead_rate_per_hour.helper: Facility and equipment overhead allocated per hour of welding.

rework_rate_percent.label: Rework Rate (%)
rework_rate_percent.helper: Percentage of welds requiring rework (defect rate).

rework_cost_factor.label: Rework Cost Factor
rework_cost_factor.helper: Multiplier on original cost to account for rework (cutting, re-welding, inspection).

weld_process_type.label: Welding Process Type
weld_process_type.helper: Standard arc welding process per AWS A3.0.

use_premium_material.label: Use Premium Filler Material
use_premium_material.helper: Toggle to apply a 20% cost premium for high-performance filler wire.

basic_wind_speed.label: Basic Wind Speed (V)
basic_wind_speed.helper: Design wind speed at 10m height for the location, typically from local building codes.

terrain_category.label: Terrain Category
terrain_category.helper: Terrain roughness per ISO 4354: A=open sea, B=open country, C=suburban, D=urban.

building_height.label: Building Height (z)
building_height.helper: Height above ground to the top of the structure.

exposure_factor.label: Exposure Factor (Ce)
exposure_factor.helper: Adjustment for local topography and shielding, per ASCE 7.

gust_factor.label: Gust Effect Factor (G)
gust_factor.helper: Dynamic response factor for wind gusts, typically 0.85 for rigid structures.

pressure_coefficient.label: Pressure Coefficient (Cp)
pressure_coefficient.helper: Aerodynamic shape factor for the building surface (positive for windward, negative for leeward).

air_density.label: Air Density (ρ)
air_density.helper: Standard air density at sea level, adjust for altitude if needed.

is_cyclic_loading.label: Cyclic Loading Consideration
is_cyclic_loading.helper: If true, applies fatigue reduction factor per ISO 4354 for dynamic wind events.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Wind Turbine Calculator.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Wind Turbine Calculator.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Wind Turbine Calculator.

turbine_capacity.label: Turbine Rated Capacity (MW)
turbine_capacity.helper: Nameplate capacity of the wind turbine model under evaluation.

capacity_factor.label: Capacity Factor (%)
capacity_factor.helper: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).

capital_cost_per_mw.label: Capital Cost per MW (USD)
capital_cost_per_mw.helper: Total installed cost per MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.

opex_per_mwh.label: Operating Expenditure (USD/MWh)
opex_per_mwh.helper: Annual operations and maintenance cost per MWh generated (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).

electricity_price.label: Electricity Selling Price (USD/MWh)
electricity_price.helper: Power purchase agreement price or wholesale market price per MWh.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (%)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) used for net present value calculation.

project_lifetime.label: Project Lifetime (years)
project_lifetime.helper: Expected operational life of the wind farm (typically 20-25 years).

degradation_rate.label: Annual Degradation Rate (%)
degradation_rate.helper: Expected annual reduction in energy production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.

incentive_tax_credit.label: Production Tax Credit (USD/MWh)
incentive_tax_credit.helper: Government incentive per MWh generated (e.g., US PTC).

grid_availability.label: Grid Availability (%)
grid_availability.helper: Percentage of time the grid is available to accept power (curtailment factor).

turbine_type.label: Turbine Type
turbine_type.helper: Technology classification affecting O&M cost profiles and reliability (ISO 61400-4).

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance Strategy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Maintenance approach aligned with Lean/Six Sigma principles to minimize downtime and cost.

lost_customer_rate.helper: Percentage of customers who never return after a comeback experience (Net Promoter Score correlation)

tax_rate.label: Sales Tax Rate

shop_type.label: Shop Type

bottleneck_utilization.label: Bottleneck Utilization (%)
bottleneck_utilization.helper: Current utilization rate of the primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative period (e.g., last 4 weeks).

demand_rate.label: Average Demand Rate (units/hour)
demand_rate.helper: Average customer demand rate for the product family flowing through the bottleneck.

bottleneck_capacity.label: Bottleneck Capacity (units/hour)
bottleneck_capacity.helper: Maximum theoretical output rate of the bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.

investment_cost.label: Proposed Investment Cost ($)
investment_cost.helper: Total capital expenditure required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).

expected_capacity_increase.label: Expected Capacity Increase (%)
expected_capacity_increase.helper: Expected percentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned operating hours of the bottleneck resource per year.

profit_margin_per_unit.label: Profit Margin per Unit ($)
profit_margin_per_unit.helper: Contribution margin (revenue minus variable cost) per unit of product flowing through the bottleneck.

quality_yield.label: Quality Yield at Bottleneck (%)
quality_yield.helper: First-pass yield (percentage of good units) at the bottleneck operation.

maintenance_downtime_percent.label: Planned Maintenance Downtime (%)
maintenance_downtime_percent.helper: Percentage of total operating time allocated to planned maintenance for the bottleneck.

risk_factor.label: Implementation Risk Factor
risk_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment of the risk that the investment will not achieve the expected capacity increase.

fixedcosts.helper: Sum of all fixed expenses (rent, salaries, insurance) per period.

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Cost per Unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Direct material, labor, and overhead per unit.

actualsalesvolume.label: Actual Sales Volume
actualsalesvolume.helper: Number of units actually sold in the period.

capacityvolume.label: Maximum Capacity Volume
capacityvolume.helper: Theoretical maximum output under normal operating conditions.

demanduncertainty.label: Demand Uncertainty Factor
demanduncertainty.helper: Expected percentage variation in demand (coefficient of variation).

costescalationrate.label: Cost Escalation Rate
costescalationrate.helper: Annual expected increase in variable costs (inflation, supplier pricing).

includetax.label: Include Tax Effect
includetax.helper: If true, tax rate input is required and after-tax break-even is calculated.

taxrate.label: Tax Rate
taxrate.helper: Effective corporate tax rate, used only when includeTax is true.

calibration_interval_days.helper: Standard calibration frequency per ISO 17025 or manufacturer recommendation.

days_since_last_calibration.helper: Actual elapsed time since the most recent calibration event.

measurement_tolerance_pct.label: Measurement Tolerance (%)
measurement_tolerance_pct.helper: Maximum allowable deviation from nominal value, typically defined by process specs or Six Sigma limits.

observed_drift_pct.label: Observed Drift (%)
observed_drift_pct.helper: Measured deviation from nominal at last verification, expressed as percentage of full scale.

environmental_stress_factor.label: Environmental Stress Factor
environmental_stress_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment of temperature, humidity, vibration, and contamination effects on drift rate.

criticality_level.label: Criticality Level
criticality_level.helper: Impact of measurement error on product quality, safety, or regulatory compliance (per ISO 9001 risk-based thinking).

historical_failure_rate.label: Historical Failure Rate (per 100 calibrations)
historical_failure_rate.helper: Number of times the instrument exceeded tolerance in the last 100 calibration events, used for reliability trending.

transport_distance.label: Average Transport Distance per Unit

dio.label: Days Inventory Outstanding (DIO)
dio.helper: Average number of days inventory is held before sale. Lower DIO reduces holding costs.

dpo.label: Days Payables Outstanding (DPO)
dpo.helper: Average number of days to pay suppliers. Higher DPO conserves cash.

total_imported_tonnes.label: Total Imported Tonnes (steel/aluminum/cement/fertilizer/hydrogen)
total_imported_tonnes.helper: Total mass of CBAM-covered goods imported in the reporting period.

embedded_emissions_per_tonne.label: Embedded Emissions per Tonne
embedded_emissions_per_tonne.helper: Direct and indirect GHG emissions embedded in the imported goods (scope 1+2).

carbon_price_origin.label: Carbon Price Paid in Country of Origin
carbon_price_origin.placeholder: Enter carbon price paid in country of origin
carbon_price_origin.helper: Effective carbon price already paid in the exporting country (e.g., EU ETS equivalent).

cbam_certificate_price.label: CBAM Certificate Price (current auction)
cbam_certificate_price.helper: Latest weekly average auction price of CBAM certificates.

free_allocation_factor.label: Free Allocation Factor for Sector
free_allocation_factor.placeholder: Enter free allocation factor for sector
free_allocation_factor.helper: Proportion of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the product sector.

verification_status.label: Verification Status of Embedded Emissions
verification_status.placeholder: Enter verification status of embedded emissions
verification_status.helper: Whether the embedded emissions data has been independently verified by an accredited body.

compliance_deadline_met.label: Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.placeholder: Enter compliance deadline met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.helper: Indicates if the importer submitted the required CBAM report before the quarterly deadline.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total output of the primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons per year.

carbon_intensity.label: Carbon Intensity
carbon_intensity.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions per ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.

cbam_carbon_price.label: CBAM Carbon Price
cbam_carbon_price.helper: Expected or current EU ETS allowance price used for CBAM certificate calculation.

free_allocation_percentage.label: Free Allocation Percentage
free_allocation_percentage.helper: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.

production_efficiency_index.label: Production Efficiency Index
production_efficiency_index.helper: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher values reduce waste and emissions.

compliance_readiness_score.label: Compliance Readiness Score
compliance_readiness_score.helper: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness per CBAM requirements.

industry_benchmark_intensity.label: Industry Benchmark Intensity
industry_benchmark_intensity.helper: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

emission_scope.label: Emission Scope
emission_scope.helper: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

use_verified_data.label: Use Verified Data Only
use_verified_data.helper: If true, only data from verified sources (e.g., accredited verifier) is used; otherwise estimated data may be included.

celsius_input.label: Temperature in Celsius
celsius_input.helper: Process temperature reading from sensor or manual measurement. Must be above absolute zero.

sensor_accuracy.label: Sensor Accuracy (±°C)
sensor_accuracy.helper: Manufacturer-specified accuracy of the temperature sensor (ISO 17025 calibration standard).

calibration_offset.label: Calibration Offset
calibration_offset.helper: Field calibration adjustment to align sensor with reference standard (NIST traceable).

unit_system.label: Target Unit System
unit_system.helper: Select output temperature scale for downstream process or reporting (ISO 80000-5).

enable_alerts.label: Enable Process Alerts
enable_alerts.helper: Toggle threshold-based alerts for out-of-spec temperature conditions (Six Sigma control limits).

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Center of Gravity.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Centripetal Acceleration.

changeover_time_matrix.label: Changeover Time Matrix (minutes)
changeover_time_matrix.helper: Average time to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

number_of_changeovers_per_month.label: Number of Changeovers per Month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.placeholder: Enter number of changeovers per month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.helper: Total changeovers performed monthly across all shifts. Used to calculate total changeover downtime.

setup_external_time.label: External Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.placeholder: Enter external setup time per changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.helper: Setup activities that can be performed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Target for SMED optimization.

setup_internal_time.label: Internal Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.placeholder: Enter internal setup time per changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.helper: Setup activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary target for reduction via SMED.

product_family_count.label: Number of Product Families
product_family_count.helper: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

standard_deviation_changeover_time.label: Standard Deviation of Changeover Time (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.placeholder: Enter standard deviation of changeover time (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.helper: Measure of variability in changeover times. Used for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

shift_pattern.label: Shift Pattern
shift_pattern.helper: Operating schedule affecting available production time and changeover frequency.

lean_smed_implemented.label: SMED Implementation Status
lean_smed_implemented.helper: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

target_changeover_time.label: Target Changeover Time (minutes)
target_changeover_time.helper: SMED target for changeover time reduction. Typically <10 minutes for world-class performance.

cutting_speed.helper: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed of the cutting tool relative to workpiece.

depth_of_cut.label: Depth of Cut (ap)
depth_of_cut.helper: ISO 8688-1: Radial engagement of the tool.

tool_overhang.label: Tool Overhang (L)
tool_overhang.helper: ISO 3685: Free length of tool holder; affects stiffness.

tool_diameter.label: Tool Diameter (D)
tool_diameter.helper: ISO 3685: Cutter diameter for milling or turning insert diameter.

workpiece_material_hardness.label: Workpiece Material Hardness
workpiece_material_hardness.helper: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

machine_spindle_power.label: Machine Spindle Power (P_m)
machine_spindle_power.helper: ISO 841: Rated power of the spindle motor.

machine_damping_ratio.label: Machine Damping Ratio (ζ)
machine_damping_ratio.helper: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

tool_material.label: Tool Material
tool_material.helper: ISO 513: Tool substrate affects wear and stiffness.

coolant_application.label: Coolant Application
coolant_application.helper: ISO 13743: Flood coolant reduces thermal effects and can alter chatter.

total_sq_ft.label: Total Area (sq ft)
total_sq_ft.helper: Total cleanable floor area in square feet. Basis for all labor and material calculations.

cleaning_frequency.label: Cleaning Frequency per Week
cleaning_frequency.helper: Number of times the facility is cleaned per week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Rate ($/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

labor_burden_percent.label: Labor Burden (%)
labor_burden_percent.helper: Percentage added to labor rate for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

productivity_sqft_per_hour.label: Productivity Rate (sq ft/hour)
productivity_sqft_per_hour.helper: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

material_cost_per_sqft.label: Material Cost ($/sq ft)
material_cost_per_sqft.helper: Cost of cleaning chemicals, paper, and consumables per square foot per cleaning.

equipment_cost_per_sqft.label: Equipment Cost ($/sq ft)
equipment_cost_per_sqft.helper: Amortized equipment cost (mops, vacuums, buffers) per square foot per cleaning.

overhead_percent.label: Overhead (%)
overhead_percent.helper: Indirect costs (management, office, insurance) as percentage of direct costs.

desired_margin_percent.label: Desired Profit Margin (%)
desired_margin_percent.helper: Target net profit margin on the bid.

waste_factor_percent.label: Waste Factor (%)
waste_factor_percent.helper: Allowance for material waste, rework, and inefficiency (Lean Six Sigma waste reduction).

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Service quality tier. Affects labor productivity and material usage. Healthcare adds 15% to labor.

use_lean_methods.label: Use Lean Methods (5S, Standard Work)
use_lean_methods.placeholder: Enter use lean methods (5s, standard work)
use_lean_methods.helper: If true, applies 10% productivity improvement via Lean techniques.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Clearance Fit.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Clearance Fit.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Clearance Fit.

api_call_volume.label: Monthly API Call Volume
api_call_volume.helper: Total number of API calls made per month, including successful and overrun calls.

overrun_rate.label: Overrun Rate
overrun_rate.helper: Percentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response time threshold (e.g., >200ms).

avg_overrun_duration.label: Average Overrun Duration
avg_overrun_duration.helper: Average extra time beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

cost_per_call.label: Cost per API Call
cost_per_call.helper: Direct cost per API call (compute, network, storage).

retry_cost_per_call.label: Retry Cost per Call
retry_cost_per_call.helper: Additional cost incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

retry_rate.label: Retry Rate
retry_rate.helper: Percentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

data_egress_gb.label: Monthly Data Egress
data_egress_gb.helper: Total data transferred out of the cloud per month.

egress_cost_per_gb.label: Egress Cost per GB
egress_cost_per_gb.helper: Cost per GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

sla_penalty_percentage.label: SLA Penalty Percentage
sla_penalty_percentage.helper: Percentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

monthly_service_fee.label: Monthly Service Fee
monthly_service_fee.helper: Base monthly fee paid to the cloud provider.

overrun_threshold_ms.label: Overrun Threshold (SLA)
overrun_threshold_ms.helper: Maximum acceptable response time per the SLA.

region.label: Cloud Region
region.helper: Geographic region of the cloud service, affects egress costs and latency.

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Costs (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: Enter include hidden costs (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, adds estimated hidden costs like customer churn and brand impact.

total_cloud_spend.label: Total Cloud Spend (Monthly)
total_cloud_spend.helper: Total monthly cloud infrastructure cost across all services.

compute_utilization_rate.label: Average Compute Utilization Rate
compute_utilization_rate.helper: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.

storage_waste_percentage.label: Storage Waste Percentage
storage_waste_percentage.helper: Estimated percentage of storage that is orphaned, unused, or over-provisioned.

idle_resource_count.label: Idle Resource Count
idle_resource_count.helper: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 days.

data_transfer_out_gb.label: Monthly Data Transfer Out
data_transfer_out_gb.helper: Total outbound data transfer volume per month.

reserved_instance_coverage.label: Reserved Instance Coverage
reserved_instance_coverage.helper: Percentage of compute spend covered by reserved or savings plans.

rightsizing_opportunity_score.label: Rightsizing Opportunity Score
rightsizing_opportunity_score.helper: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.

cloud_provider.label: Cloud Provider
cloud_provider.helper: Primary cloud provider for cost analysis.

include_network_waste.label: Include Network Waste Analysis
include_network_waste.helper: Toggle to include network-related waste (e.g., data transfer, load balancer inefficiencies).

length_cm.label: Length in Centimeters
length_cm.helper: Measured length in centimeters, typically from calipers, rulers, or CAD models.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty of the measurement (e.g., ±0.05 cm for standard calipers).

conversion_precision.label: Conversion Precision
conversion_precision.helper: Select the conversion factor precision based on industry standard (ISO 80000-1, NIST).

tolerance_class.label: Tolerance Class
tolerance_class.helper: Tolerance class for dimensional inspection per ISO 2768. Affects alert thresholds.

unit_cost_per_inch.label: Unit Cost per Inch
unit_cost_per_inch.helper: Cost per inch of material or product, used for cost estimation in Lean/Six Sigma projects.

batch_quantity.label: Batch Quantity
batch_quantity.helper: Number of units in the batch for total cost and waste calculations.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for CMYK to RGB.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for CMYK to RGB.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for CMYK to RGB.

annual_manual_labor_cost.label: Annual Manual Labor Cost (per FTE)
annual_manual_labor_cost.placeholder: Enter annual manual labor cost (per fte)
annual_manual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual cost per full-time equivalent worker including wages, benefits, and overhead.

number_of_workers.label: Number of Workers Replaced
number_of_workers.helper: Number of manual workers that could be replaced or augmented by one cobot.

cobot_purchase_price.label: Cobot Purchase Price
cobot_purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for the cobot including end-effector and controller.

cobot_annual_maintenance.label: Cobot Annual Maintenance Cost
cobot_annual_maintenance.helper: Annual service contract, spare parts, and software updates.

cobot_lifespan_years.label: Cobot Lifespan
cobot_lifespan_years.helper: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital for NPV calculation.

labor_productivity_factor.label: Manual Labor Productivity Factor
labor_productivity_factor.helper: Efficiency factor for manual labor (1.0 = 100% productive, 0.85 = typical with breaks/errors).

cobot_uptime_percent.label: Cobot Uptime
cobot_uptime_percent.helper: Percentage of scheduled time the cobot is operational (excluding planned maintenance).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Number of shifts per day the cobot will operate (manual labor typically single shift).

include_training_cost.label: Include Cobot Training Cost
include_training_cost.helper: Whether to include initial training and integration costs.

training_cost.label: Cobot Training & Integration Cost
training_cost.helper: One-time cost for programming, safety validation, and operator training.

annual_costs.label: Annual Costs
annual_costs.helper: Recurring costs such as maintenance, labor, and materials.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate
discount_rate.helper: Annual discount rate reflecting the time value of money.

project_lifetime.label: Project Lifetime
project_lifetime.helper: Expected duration over which benefits and costs are considered.

cpk.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)
cpk.helper: Cpk is a standard Six Sigma metric indicating how well a process meets specification limits, accounting for centering. Typical targets: 1.33 (minimum acceptable), 1.67 (good), 2.0 (excellent).

sigmashift.label: Sigma Shift (long-term drift)
sigmashift.helper: Accounts for long-term process drift. Standard Six Sigma assumption is 1.5 sigma shift. Adjust based on historical data or industry norms (e.g., automotive often uses 1.5).

distributiontype.label: Distribution Type
distributiontype.helper: Select distribution based on sample size and data characteristics. Normal for large samples (n>30), t-distribution for small samples (n<30) to account for uncertainty.

samplesize.label: Sample Size (n)
samplesize.helper: Number of observations used to estimate Cpk. Larger samples improve confidence. Required for t-distribution adjustment.

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Confidence level for the confidence interval of the PPM estimate. Higher levels provide more conservative (wider) intervals.

useconfidenceinterval.label: Use Confidence Interval
useconfidenceinterval.helper: If enabled, the tool calculates lower and upper bounds for PPM based on the confidence level. Useful for risk assessment.

planned_duration_days.label: Planned Duration (Days)
planned_duration_days.helper: Total planned duration of the project from start to finish, as per CPM schedule baseline.

actual_duration_days.label: Actual Duration (Days)
actual_duration_days.helper: Actual elapsed duration from project start to current date or completion.

daily_penalty_rate.label: Daily Penalty Rate (Currency)
daily_penalty_rate.helper: Contractual liquidated damages or penalty per day of delay beyond the planned duration.

critical_path_float_total.label: Total Float on Critical Path (Days)
critical_path_float_total.placeholder: Enter total float on critical path (days)
critical_path_float_total.helper: Sum of total float for all activities on the critical path. Zero or negative indicates schedule compression.

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
productivity_factor.helper: Lean metric: ratio of actual output to standard output. Values below 0.8 indicate significant waste.

rework_percentage.label: Rework Percentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Percentage of completed work requiring rework, a key Six Sigma quality metric.

delay_type.label: Delay Type
delay_type.helper: Classification per standard construction delay analysis (AACE, SCL protocols).

use_earned_schedule.label: Use Earned Schedule Method
use_earned_schedule.helper: If true, applies earned schedule (ES) metrics for more accurate delay impact assessment.

balance.label: Current Balance
balance.helper: The outstanding balance on your credit card statement.

interestrate.label: Annual Interest Rate (APR)
interestrate.helper: The annual percentage rate charged on the credit card balance.

minpaymentpercent.label: Minimum Payment Percentage
minpaymentpercent.helper: The percentage of the balance used to calculate the minimum payment (e.g., 2% of balance).

minfixedamount.label: Minimum Fixed Amount
minfixedamount.helper: The fixed minimum payment amount if the percentage-based amount is lower (e.g., $25).

outstanding_balance.label: Outstanding Balance
outstanding_balance.helper: The total outstanding balance on the credit card subject to interest calculation.

annual_interest_rate.label: Annual Interest Rate
annual_interest_rate.helper: The annual percentage rate (APR) charged on the outstanding balance.

minimum_payment_percentage.label: Minimum Payment Percentage
minimum_payment_percentage.helper: The percentage of the outstanding balance that constitutes the minimum payment, often set by the card issuer.

fixed_minimum_amount.label: Fixed Minimum Amount
fixed_minimum_amount.helper: The minimum dollar amount required if the percentage-based calculation yields a lower amount.

current_balance.label: Current Balance ($)
current_balance.helper: Enter the total outstanding credit card balance you want to pay off. This is the principal amount before interest.

annual_interest_rate.label: Annual Interest Rate (APR)
annual_interest_rate.helper: Annual nominal interest rate used to calculate monthly finance charges.

monthly_payment.label: Fixed Monthly Payment
monthly_payment.helper: Regular monthly payment amount applied toward the balance.

credit_card_balance.label: Outstanding Balance
credit_card_balance.helper: Current principal amount owed on the credit card before interest accrual.

extra_monthly_payment.label: Extra Monthly Payment
extra_monthly_payment.helper: Additional amount paid each month beyond the regular payment to accelerate payoff.

transactionamount.label: Transaction Amount ($)
transactionamount.helper: The total amount charged to the customer before fees.

percentagefee.label: Percentage Fee (%)
percentagefee.helper: The percentage of the transaction amount charged by the processor (e.g., 2.9% for many card networks).

fixedfee.label: Fixed Fee per Transaction ($)
fixedfee.helper: A flat fee charged per transaction (e.g., $0.30 for many card networks).

monthlyvolume.label: Monthly Transaction Volume
monthlyvolume.helper: The number of credit card transactions processed per month.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Cricket Net Run Rate.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Cricket Net Run Rate.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Cricket Net Run Rate.

expected_yield.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)
expected_yield.helper: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed genetics and local potential.

actual_yield.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)
actual_yield.helper: Measured yield at harvest, used as baseline for loss calculation.

harvest_loss_pct.label: Harvest Loss (%)
harvest_loss_pct.helper: Percentage of crop lost during harvesting operations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

post_harvest_loss_pct.label: Post-Harvest Loss (%)
post_harvest_loss_pct.helper: Losses during handling, storage, and transport after harvest.

field_condition.label: Field Condition
field_condition.helper: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.

irrigation_type.label: Irrigation Type
irrigation_type.helper: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.

pest_pressure.label: Pest Pressure (0-10)
pest_pressure.helper: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).

disease_index.label: Disease Index (0-10)
disease_index.helper: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

weed_cover_pct.label: Weed Cover (%)
weed_cover_pct.helper: Percentage of field area covered by weeds, competing for resources.

soil_quality_score.label: Soil Quality Score (0-100)
soil_quality_score.helper: Aggregate soil health metric (organic matter, pH, structure, etc.).

labor_efficiency.label: Labor Efficiency (0-100)
labor_efficiency.helper: Rating of labor productivity and skill level in field operations.

equipment_reliability.label: Equipment Reliability (0-100)
equipment_reliability.helper: Percentage of time equipment operates without breakdown during critical periods.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Crypto Converter.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Crypto Converter.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Crypto Converter.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Cube Surface Area.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Cube Surface Area.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Currency Converter.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Currency Converter.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Currency Converter.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Customer Lifetime Value.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Customer Lifetime Value.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Customer Lifetime Value.

cutvolume.label: Cut Volume
cutvolume.helper: Total volume of material to be excavated from cut areas, measured in bank cubic meters (BCM).

fillvolume.label: Fill Volume
fillvolume.helper: Total volume of material required for fill/embankment areas, measured in compacted cubic meters (CCM).

swellfactor.label: Swell Factor
swellfactor.helper: Factor accounting for volume increase when material is excavated (loose state vs. bank state). Typical range 1.1–1.4.

shrinkagefactor.label: Shrinkage Factor
shrinkagefactor.helper: Factor accounting for volume decrease when material is compacted (compacted state vs. bank state). Typical range 0.75–0.95.

hauldistance.label: Average Haul Distance
hauldistance.helper: Average one-way distance from cut to fill areas, used for cost and fuel calculations.

unithaulcost.label: Unit Haul Cost
unithaulcost.helper: Cost per cubic meter per kilometer of hauling material, including fuel, labor, and equipment depreciation.

wastedisposalcost.label: Waste Disposal Cost
wastedisposalcost.helper: Cost per cubic meter for disposing excess material at a designated waste site.

feed_rate.helper: Linear distance the tool advances per revolution, affects chip load and tool wear.

depth_of_cut.helper: Radial or axial engagement of the tool, influences cutting forces and heat generation.

tool_material.helper: Material of the cutting tool, affects wear resistance and optimal cutting parameters.

workpiece_material.label: Workpiece Material
workpiece_material.helper: Material being machined, determines machinability rating and recommended speeds.

coolant_used.label: Coolant Used
coolant_used.helper: Indicates if coolant is applied, reduces thermal stress and extends tool life.

machine_stability_factor.label: Machine Stability Factor
machine_stability_factor.helper: Factor representing machine rigidity and vibration damping, based on condition monitoring data.

selling_price_per_liter.helper: Average revenue per liter of raw milk sold to processor or retail.

energy_cost_per_day.helper: Daily electricity, fuel, and cooling costs.

fixed_costs.helper: Costs that remain constant regardless of production volume.

interest_expense.helper: Cost of debt financing, affects net income.

tax_rate.label: Tax Rate
tax_rate.helper: The corporate tax rate affects the after-tax cost of debt and the earnings available to equity holders.

variable_costs.helper: Costs that vary directly with production volume, such as raw materials and direct labor.

labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage of cutting operator, used for labor cost estimation.

allowance_percentage.helper: Extra fabric allowance for seam, shrinkage, or alignment tolerances per ISO 4915.

distance_matrix.label: Distance Matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)

distance_matrix.helper: Current or proposed travel distances between department centroids.

path_efficiency_factor.helper: Ratio of straight-line distance to actual travel path (1.0 = perfect straight line).

layout_type.helper: Classification of the facility layout according to standard industrial engineering taxonomy.

use_weighted_distance.label: Use Weighted Distance (Flow × Distance)
use_weighted_distance.helper: If true, the primary result is the sum of flow × distance; otherwise raw distance sum.

raw_material_cost_per_kg.label: Raw material cost per kg
raw_material_cost_per_kg.placeholder: Enter raw material cost per kg
raw_material_cost_per_kg.helper: Cost of primary feed ingredients (corn, soybean meal, etc.) per kilogram.

processing_loss_percent.label: Processing loss (%)
processing_loss_percent.helper: Percentage of raw material lost during milling, mixing, pelleting, or storage.

moisture_adjustment_factor.label: Moisture adjustment factor
moisture_adjustment_factor.helper: Correction factor for moisture content variation in raw materials (1.0 = standard).

quality_grade.label: Quality grade
quality_grade.helper: Grade of feed based on nutrient density and consistency (premium, standard, economy).

include_transport_cost.label: Include transport cost?
include_transport_cost.helper: If true, adds a fixed transport surcharge per kg of feed.

recycling_machine_cost.label: Recycling Machine Purchase Cost
recycling_machine_cost.helper: Capital expenditure for the recycling extruder/pelletizer system.

machine_life_years.label: Machine Useful Life
machine_life_years.helper: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Routine maintenance, spare parts, and service contracts.

recycling_energy_consumption.label: Recycling Energy Consumption
recycling_energy_consumption.helper: Energy required per kg of recycled filament produced.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate
labor_rate.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for operator.

labor_hours_per_kg.label: Labor Hours per kg
labor_hours_per_kg.helper: Direct labor time to process one kg of recycled filament.

waste_collection_cost.label: Waste Collection Cost
waste_collection_cost.helper: Cost to collect and transport scrap plastic to recycling facility.

virgin_filament_price.label: Virgin Filament Market Price
virgin_filament_price.helper: Current market price for virgin PLA/ABS/PETG filament.

recycling_yield.label: Recycling Yield
recycling_yield.helper: Percentage of input waste that becomes usable filament (losses due to contamination, degradation).

quality_factor.label: Quality Factor (vs Virgin)
quality_factor.helper: Relative mechanical/print quality of recycled filament compared to virgin (e.g., 90% means 10% more material needed for same strength).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total kg of recycled filament produced per year.

waste_type.label: Waste Type
waste_type.helper: Type of plastic waste being recycled; affects processing parameters and yield.

include_carbon_cost.label: Include Carbon Cost
include_carbon_cost.helper: If true, adds a carbon penalty cost based on estimated emissions.

ebit.helper: EBIT measures a company's operating profitability before interest and tax expenses, serving as the numerator for the fixed charge coverage ratio.

interest_expense.helper: Interest expense represents the cost of borrowed funds, a key fixed charge that the company must cover.

lease_payments.label: Lease Payments
lease_payments.helper: Lease payments are fixed contractual obligations that must be included as fixed charges for coverage calculation.

preferred_dividends.label: Preferred Dividends (pre-tax equivalent)
preferred_dividends.helper: Preferred dividends are fixed payments to preferred shareholders, adjusted to pre-tax basis for consistency with EBIT.

tax_rate.label: Effective Tax Rate
tax_rate.helper: Effective tax rate is used to convert preferred dividends to a pre-tax equivalent, ensuring all fixed charges are on a comparable basis.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Flat Rate VAT.

net_amount.helper: The net amount is the base value before VAT is applied, representing the actual transaction value.

vat_rate.helper: The VAT rate is the percentage applied to the net amount to calculate the VAT amount, typically set by tax authorities.

flat_rate_percentage.label: Flat Rate Percentage
flat_rate_percentage.helper: The flat rate percentage is a fixed percentage applied to the net amount to calculate the VAT due under a flat rate scheme, often used by small businesses.

target_setup_time.helper: Expected setup time after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

unit_cost_per_kg.label: Unit Cost per kg ($)
unit_cost_per_kg.helper: Standard cost of raw materials per kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

rework_percentage.label: Rework Percentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Estimated fraction of the affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

rework_cost_per_kg.helper: Additional cost per kilogram for rework activities (labor, energy, extra materials).

hourly_overhead_rate.label: Hourly Overhead Rate ($/hr)

base_penalty_amount.label: Base Penalty Amount ($)
base_penalty_amount.helper: Estimated base fine or penalty if regulatory action is taken. Used only when regulatory_penalty_flag is true.

recall_cost_flag.label: Recall Cost Included?

recall_variable_per_kg.helper: Per-kilogram cost for recall handling (transport, disposal, replacement).

cold_inlet_temp.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temperature

hot_specific_heat.label: Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity

energy_cost.helper: Cost of thermal energy (steam, hot water, or electricity for pumping).

operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual operating hours of the heat exchanger.

production_loss_factor.label: Production Loss Factor
production_loss_factor.helper: Percentage of production capacity lost due to reduced heat transfer (e.g., slower throughput).

revenue_per_unit_product.label: Revenue per Unit Product
revenue_per_unit_product.helper: Revenue generated per kg of product processed through the exchanger.

exchanger_type.label: Heat Exchanger Type
exchanger_type.helper: Type of heat exchanger; affects fouling factors and cleaning intervals.

fouling_factor_known.label: Fouling Factor Known?
fouling_factor_known.helper: If true, user provides measured fouling factor directly; otherwise calculated from UA ratio.

measured_fouling_factor.label: Measured Fouling Factor (R_f)

homevalue.label: Home Value ($)
homevalue.helper: The current market value of your home. This is used to calculate the maximum loan amount based on loan-to-value ratio.

mortgagebalance.label: Mortgage Balance ($)
mortgagebalance.helper: The remaining amount you owe on your primary mortgage. This is subtracted from home value to determine available equity.

ltvlimit.label: Max LTV Ratio (%)
ltvlimit.helper: The maximum loan-to-value ratio allowed by the lender. Typically 80% for home equity loans. This determines the maximum total debt against the home.

interestrate.label: Interest Rate (%)
interestrate.helper: Annual interest rate on the home equity loan. This affects the monthly payment and total interest paid.

loanterm.label: Loan Term (years)
loanterm.helper: The repayment period for the home equity loan. Common terms are 10, 15, 20, or 30 years.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for How Long to Lose Weight.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for How Long to Lose Weight.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for How Long to Lose Weight.

annual_income.label: Annual Income ($)
annual_income.helper: Your total gross annual income before taxes.

monthly_debt.label: Monthly Debt Payments ($)
monthly_debt.helper: Total monthly debt obligations including car loans, student loans, credit cards, etc.

down_payment.label: Down Payment ($)
down_payment.helper: Amount you can pay upfront toward the home purchase.

interest_rate.label: Annual Interest Rate (%)
interest_rate.helper: Current mortgage interest rate as a percentage.

loan_term.label: Loan Term (years)
loan_term.helper: Number of years to repay the mortgage.

property_tax_rate.label: Property Tax Rate (%)
property_tax_rate.helper: Annual property tax rate as a percentage of home value.

horsepower.label: Horsepower (HP)
horsepower.helper: Mechanical power rating of motor or engine. Typical range for industrial motors: 0.5–5000 hp.

hp_type.label: Horsepower Type
hp_type.helper: Different horsepower definitions affect conversion factor. Mechanical HP = 745.7 W, Metric HP = 735.5 W, Electrical HP = 746 W.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency of the motor at rated load. Typical IE3 motors: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.

load_factor.label: Load Factor
load_factor.helper: Percentage of rated load at which the motor operates. Underloaded motors reduce efficiency.

power_factor.label: Power Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Typical industrial motors: 0.8–0.95 lagging.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual runtime for energy cost calculations. Common values: 2000 (single shift), 4000 (two shifts), 8000 (continuous).

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Cost
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average industrial electricity rate. Range: $0.05–$0.30 in most regions.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for HRV Biofeedback.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for HRV Biofeedback.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for HRV Biofeedback.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for HSL to RGB.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for HSL to RGB.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for HSL to RGB.

cooling_load.label: Cooling Load
cooling_load.helper: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

heating_load.label: Heating Load
heating_load.helper: Total heat loss from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

ambient_temperature.label: Ambient Temperature
ambient_temperature.helper: Outdoor dry-bulb temperature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

relative_humidity.label: Relative Humidity
relative_humidity.helper: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil performance.

efficiency_ratio.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
efficiency_ratio.helper: Current system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

airflow_rate.label: Airflow Rate
airflow_rate.helper: Supply air volume, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

duct_leakage_factor.label: Duct Leakage Factor
duct_leakage_factor.helper: Estimated leakage as percentage of total airflow; affects effective capacity.

occupancy_density.label: Occupancy Density
occupancy_density.helper: People per square meter, impacts internal heat gain (ASHRAE 62.1).

is_preventive_maintenance_active.label: Preventive Maintenance Active
is_preventive_maintenance_active.helper: Indicates if PM schedule is followed; affects degradation factor.

flow_rate.label: Flow Rate
flow_rate.helper: Volumetric flow rate of hydraulic fluid through the system. Typical range for industrial systems: 10-500 L/min.

pressure_drop_total.label: Total Pressure Drop
pressure_drop_total.helper: Sum of all pressure losses across components (pipes, valves, fittings). ISO 4409 recommends measurement at steady state.

fluid_density.label: Fluid Density
fluid_density.helper: Density of hydraulic fluid at operating temperature. Typical mineral oil: 850-900 kg/m³.

kinematic_viscosity.label: Kinematic Viscosity
kinematic_viscosity.helper: Fluid viscosity at operating temperature. ISO VG 46 is common for industrial hydraulics.

pipe_length.label: Total Pipe Length
pipe_length.helper: Total length of hydraulic piping in the system. Longer runs increase friction losses.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
pipe_diameter.helper: Inner diameter of the main hydraulic pipe. Affects flow velocity and Reynolds number.

valve_count.label: Number of Valves
valve_count.helper: Total number of directional, pressure, and flow control valves in the system.

fitting_count.label: Number of Fittings
fitting_count.helper: Total number of elbows, tees, reducers, and other fittings.

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: Application type influences typical loss factors and maintenance intervals.

is_new_system.label: New System (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.placeholder: Enter new system (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.helper: New systems may have different loss characteristics due to break-in period.

benchmark_return.label: Benchmark Return
benchmark_return.helper: Annualized return of the benchmark index (as a percentage).

tracking_error.label: Tracking Error
tracking_error.helper: Standard deviation of the excess returns (portfolio return minus benchmark return) over the period (as a percentage).

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Interest Coverage Ratio.

annualinterestrate.helper: Annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%).

loan_amount.label: Loan Amount
loan_amount.helper: Total principal amount borrowed, in USD.

annual_interest_rate.label: Annual Interest Rate
annual_interest_rate.helper: Nominal annual interest rate as a percentage, e.g., 5 for 5% p.a.

payments_per_year.label: Payments per Year
payments_per_year.helper: Number of interest payments per year (12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly, 2 for semi-annual, 1 for annual).

loan_term_years.label: Loan Term (Years)
loan_term_years.helper: Duration of the interest-only period in years. Principal remains unchanged during this period.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Internal Energy.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Internal Energy.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Internal Energy.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Interquartile Range.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Interquartile Range.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Interquartile Range.

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory Value (USD)
avg_inventory_value.helper: Total average value of inventory over the period (e.g., monthly average of COGS-based inventory).

cogs_annual.label: Annual Cost of Goods Sold (USD)
cogs_annual.placeholder: Enter annual cost of goods sold (usd)
cogs_annual.helper: Total cost of goods sold over the last 12 months.

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of monthly demand (standard deviation / mean). Higher values indicate greater unpredictability.

obsolescence_rate.label: Obsolescence Rate (% per year)
obsolescence_rate.helper: Annual percentage of inventory value that becomes obsolete or expired.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying Cost Rate (% per year)
carrying_cost_rate.placeholder: Enter inventory carrying cost rate (% per year)
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, capital, etc.) as a percentage of inventory value.

lead_time_days.label: Average Lead Time (Days)
lead_time_days.helper: Average replenishment lead time from order placement to receipt.

service_level_target.label: Service Level Target (%)
service_level_target.helper: Target fill rate or cycle service level (e.g., 95% = 0.95).

inventory_accuracy_pct.label: Inventory Record Accuracy (%)
inventory_accuracy_pct.helper: Percentage of inventory records matching physical counts (cycle count accuracy).

industry_benchmark_turnover.label: Industry Benchmark Turnover (turns/year)
industry_benchmark_turnover.helper: Expected turnover rate for the industry (e.g., WERC benchmark).

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Inverse Z Transform.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
