tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Irregular Polygon Area.

water_volume.label: Annual water volume used
water_volume.helper: Total volume of water withdrawn for irrigation per year.

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water cost per m³
water_cost_per_m3.helper: Unit cost of water including extraction, treatment, and delivery.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Energy cost per kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average electricity cost for pumping and distribution.

pump_efficiency.label: Pump system efficiency
pump_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency of pump and motor system (ISO 9906).

distribution_losses.label: Distribution losses
distribution_losses.helper: Percentage of water lost due to leaks, evaporation, and runoff.

labor_hours_per_year.label: Annual labor hours for irrigation
labor_hours_per_year.placeholder: Enter annual labor hours for irrigation
labor_hours_per_year.helper: Total labor hours dedicated to irrigation operation and maintenance.

maintenance_cost.label: Annual maintenance cost
maintenance_cost.helper: Total annual cost for repairs, parts, and servicing.

crop_value_per_ha.label: Crop value per hectare
crop_value_per_ha.helper: Average revenue generated per hectare from irrigated crops.

system_type.label: Irrigation system type
system_type.helper: Type of irrigation system affecting efficiency and cost structure.

water_source.label: Water source
water_source.helper: Source of water influencing cost and sustainability.

has_automation.label: Automation system installed
has_automation.helper: Indicates presence of automated scheduling or sensor-based control.

total_energy_consumption.label: Total Energy Consumption
total_energy_consumption.helper: Total energy consumed by the organization in the baseline period (e.g., one year).

production_volume.label: Production Volume
production_volume.helper: Total production output in the baseline period (e.g., number of products, tons, or other relevant unit).

heating_degree_days.label: Heating Degree Days (HDD)
heating_degree_days.helper: Annual heating degree days for the facility location, used to normalize weather-related energy use.

cooling_degree_days.label: Cooling Degree Days (CDD)
cooling_degree_days.helper: Annual cooling degree days for the facility location, used to normalize weather-related energy use.

operating_hours.label: Operating Hours
operating_hours.helper: Total hours the facility operated during the baseline period.

energy_source_mix.label: Energy Source Mix
energy_source_mix.helper: Primary energy sources used, affecting emission factors and normalization.

baseline_type.label: Baseline Type
baseline_type.helper: Type of baseline per ISO 50001:2018 clause 6.3.

use_weather_normalization.label: Apply Weather Normalization
use_weather_normalization.helper: If true, adjusts energy consumption for heating and cooling degree days.

use_production_normalization.label: Apply Production Normalization
use_production_normalization.helper: If true, adjusts energy consumption for production volume.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Jack Daniels VDOT.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Jack Daniels VDOT.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Jack Daniels VDOT.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Japanese Calendar.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Japanese Calendar.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Japanese Calendar.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Josephus Problem.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Josephus Problem.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Josephus Problem.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate (per hour)
labor_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead. Based on industry benchmarks (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.6).

operators_affected.label: Number of Operators Affected
operators_affected.helper: Number of direct operators whose work is impacted by the Kaizen event. Used to calculate labor savings.

time_saved_per_operator.label: Time Saved per Operator per Shift
time_saved_per_operator.placeholder: Enter time saved per operator per shift
time_saved_per_operator.helper: Reduction in cycle time or non-value-added time per operator per shift, measured via time studies (Lean standard work, ISO 22400).

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts per Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts per day. Typical in manufacturing (WERC DC Measures).

operating_days_per_year.label: Operating Days per Year
operating_days_per_year.helper: Annual operating days, excluding weekends and holidays. Standard for industrial planning (ISO 9001).

defect_rate_before.label: Defect Rate Before Kaizen
defect_rate_before.helper: Percentage of defective units before improvement. Six Sigma DMAIC baseline (DPMO conversion).

defect_rate_after.label: Defect Rate After Kaizen
defect_rate_after.helper: Percentage of defective units after improvement. Must be <= defect_rate_before for valid savings.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total units produced per year. Used to scale defect savings.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost of rework, scrap, warranty, and inspection per defective unit (COPQ, ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

material_cost_savings.label: Material Cost Savings (annual)
material_cost_savings.helper: Direct material savings from waste reduction, scrap reduction, or better yield. Enter 0 if not applicable.

energy_cost_savings.label: Energy Cost Savings (annual)
energy_cost_savings.helper: Energy savings from process improvements (ISO 50001, Lean energy). Enter 0 if not applicable.

implementation_cost.label: Implementation Cost (one-time)
implementation_cost.helper: Total cost to implement the Kaizen (training, equipment, downtime). Used for ROI calculation.

sustainability_factor.label: Sustainability Factor
sustainability_factor.helper: Confidence that savings will persist over time. Low = 0.7, Medium = 0.85, High = 1.0. Based on Lean sustainability audits.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Quality of input data. Low = 0.8, Medium = 0.9, High = 1.0. Affects adjusted savings.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Kendall Tau.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Kendall Tau.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Kendall Tau.

mass_kg.label: Mass in Kilograms
mass_kg.helper: Input mass value in kilograms for conversion to pounds. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and trade.

precision_level.label: Precision Level
precision_level.helper: Select number of decimal places for output rounding, per ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

use_industry_rounding.label: Use Industry Rounding (WERC)
use_industry_rounding.helper: Apply WERC standard rounding (0.5 up) for trade compliance.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty in the input measurement, used for confidence adjustment (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3).

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Knapsack Problem.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Kruskal Wallis Test.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Kruskal Wallis Test.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Land Transfer Tax.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Land Transfer Tax.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Land Transfer Tax.

mass_lbs.label: Mass in Pounds (lb)
mass_lbs.helper: Input mass value in pounds for conversion to kilograms. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and material handling.

precision_level.label: Precision Level (Decimal Places)
precision_level.helper: Select the number of decimal places for the output. Higher precision for laboratory or quality control (ISO 17025).

rounding_method.label: Rounding Method
rounding_method.helper: Rounding method per ASTM E29 or ISO 80000-1. Standard rounding (half up) is default for most industrial applications.

include_loss_analysis.label: Include Hidden Loss Analysis
include_loss_analysis.helper: Enable to calculate potential mass loss due to moisture, measurement error, or material handling (Lean Six Sigma waste analysis).

measurement_uncertainty_pct.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
measurement_uncertainty_pct.helper: Estimated measurement uncertainty as a percentage of the mass value. Based on calibration data (ISO 17025, GUM).

material_type.label: Material Type (for loss factor)
material_type.helper: Material type influences hidden loss factors (e.g., moisture absorption for hygroscopic materials, spillage for powders).

first_unit_time.label: First Unit Time (hours)
first_unit_time.helper: Standard time to produce the first unit, typically from historical data or pilot run.

learning_rate.label: Learning Rate (%)
learning_rate.helper: Percentage reduction in time per doubling of cumulative units. Typical range 70-95% for manual tasks.

cumulative_units.label: Cumulative Units Produced
cumulative_units.helper: Total number of units produced to date, used to estimate current and future unit times.

target_units.label: Target Units for Estimate
target_units.helper: The specific unit number for which the time estimate is required.

shift_length.label: Shift Length (hours)
shift_length.helper: Standard working shift duration for converting time to calendar days.

learning_model.label: Learning Curve Model
learning_model.helper: Select the theoretical model: Wright (standard), Crawford (unit), or DeJong (plateau).

include_break_in.label: Include Break-In Effect
include_break_in.helper: If true, applies a penalty factor for production interruptions (e.g., after holidays or retooling).

break_in_penalty.label: Break-In Penalty (%)
break_in_penalty.helper: Percentage increase in time for the first unit after a break, applied only if break-in is enabled.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment Purchase Price
equipmentcost.helper: Total upfront cost to acquire the asset if buying.

leasetermmonths.label: Lease Term
leasetermmonths.helper: Duration of the lease agreement in months.

monthlyleasepayment.label: Monthly Lease Payment
monthlyleasepayment.helper: Fixed monthly payment under the lease contract.

residualvalue.label: Residual Value at End of Lease
residualvalue.placeholder: Enter residual value at end of lease
residualvalue.helper: Estimated market value of the equipment at lease end (if buying, this is salvage value).

annualmaintenancecost.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (Buy)
annualmaintenancecost.helper: Expected yearly maintenance expense when owning the equipment.

leasemaintenanceincluded.label: Maintenance Included in Lease?
leasemaintenanceincluded.helper: Indicates whether the lease contract covers routine maintenance.

discountrate.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountrate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.

utilizationrate.label: Expected Utilization Rate
utilizationrate.helper: Percentage of time the equipment is expected to be productive.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax Rate
taxrate.helper: Corporate tax rate applied to depreciation and lease payment deductions.

depreciationmethod.label: Depreciation Method
depreciationmethod.helper: Method used to calculate annual depreciation for tax shield.

leasetype.label: Lease Type
leasetype.helper: Operating lease is off-balance-sheet; capital lease is treated as ownership.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Linear Progression.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Linear Progression.

liters.label: Volume in Liters
liters.helper: Total liquid volume to be converted, typically from production batch or storage tank measurement.

conversionstandard.label: Conversion Standard
conversionstandard.helper: Select the gallon standard based on regional regulatory or trade requirements (ISO 80000-1).

temperatureadjustment.label: Temperature Adjustment Factor
temperatureadjustment.helper: Correction factor for thermal expansion/contraction of liquid (per ASTM D1250). 1.0 = no adjustment.

batchlossfactor.label: Batch Loss Factor
batchlossfactor.helper: Expected percentage loss during transfer or processing (Lean Six Sigma waste reduction).

includeevaporation.label: Include Evaporation Loss
includeevaporation.helper: If true, applies an additional evaporation loss factor based on standard industrial evaporation rates.

loanamount.label: Loan Amount
loanamount.helper: The total amount borrowed, e.g., 100000 for a home loan

interestrate.label: Annual Interest Rate
interestrate.helper: The annual interest rate in percent, typically above 0.1%

loantermyears.label: Loan Term (Years)
loantermyears.helper: The duration of the loan in years, typical values 10, 15, 20, 30

paymentsperyear.label: Payments per Year
paymentsperyear.helper: Number of payments per year, e.g., 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly, 1 for annual

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Logistic Regression.

cutting_speed.helper: ISO 3685 standard for tool life; affects surface finish and cycle time.

feed_rate.label: Feed Rate (f)
feed_rate.helper: ISO 3002/1 standard; influences chip load and tool wear.

depth_of_cut.label: Depth of Cut (ap)
depth_of_cut.helper: ISO 3002/1; affects cutting forces and power consumption.

part_length.label: Part Length (L)
part_length.helper: Workpiece geometry; defines total travel distance.

part_diameter.label: Part Diameter (D)
part_diameter.helper: Workpiece diameter; used for rotational speed calculation.

tool_change_time.label: Tool Change Time (Tct)
tool_change_time.helper: SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) metric; Lean manufacturing.

tool_life_minutes.label: Tool Life (T)
tool_life_minutes.helper: ISO 3685 Taylor tool life equation; affects cost and downtime.

number_of_passes.label: Number of Passes (n_passes)
number_of_passes.helper: Roughing/finishing strategy; impacts total cycle time.

machine_type.label: Machine Type
machine_type.helper: ISO 841 for coordinate systems; affects spindle power and rigidity.

use_high_feed.label: High Feed Strategy
use_high_feed.helper: Lean Six Sigma approach to reduce cycle time; may increase tool wear.

annual_volume.label: Annual Volume (units)
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units produced or purchased per year.

scrap_rate_current.helper: Percentage of units scrapped due to defects with current material.

scrap_rate_alternative.label: Alternative Scrap Rate (%)

logistics_cost_current.label: Current Logistics Cost per Unit
logistics_cost_current.placeholder: Enter current logistics cost per unit
logistics_cost_current.helper: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for current material.

logistics_cost_alternative.label: Alternative Logistics Cost per Unit
logistics_cost_alternative.placeholder: Enter alternative logistics cost per unit
logistics_cost_alternative.helper: Transportation, handling, and warehousing cost per unit for alternative material.

changeover_cost.label: One-time Changeover Cost
changeover_cost.helper: Cost to retool, test, and qualify the alternative material.

quality_impact.label: Quality Impact on Downstream
quality_impact.helper: Expected impact of material change on downstream rework or quality issues.

supplier_reliability.label: Alternative Supplier Reliability
supplier_reliability.helper: Historical on-time delivery performance of the alternative supplier.

currency_risk.label: Currency Risk Factor
currency_risk.helper: Expected annual currency fluctuation risk if sourcing from different region.

inventory_holding_cost.label: Inventory Holding Cost Rate
inventory_holding_cost.helper: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of unit cost (WERC standard).

lead_time_current.label: Current Lead Time (days)
lead_time_current.helper: Average lead time for current material.

lead_time_alternative.label: Alternative Lead Time (days)
lead_time_alternative.helper: Average lead time for alternative material.

value_mm.helper: The linear dimension to be converted from millimeters to inches. Typical range for industrial parts: 0.1 mm to 10,000 mm.

precision.label: Decimal Precision
precision.helper: Number of decimal places for the inch result. ISO 2768-m standard suggests 2-4 decimals for general tolerances.

tolerance_mm.label: Tolerance (mm)
tolerance_mm.helper: Manufacturing tolerance in millimeters. Used to compute tolerance in inches and assess quality thresholds.

unit_system.label: Target Unit System
unit_system.helper: Select the output unit system. Imperial outputs inches; metric outputs millimeters (for cross-check).

apply_six_sigma.label: Apply Six Sigma Adjustment
apply_six_sigma.helper: If true, applies a 1.5 sigma shift to account for process drift (Six Sigma DMAIC methodology).

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Months Between Dates.

primary_value.label: Primary value

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Motor Efficiency.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Motor Efficiency.

mpg_value.label: Fuel Economy (MPG)
mpg_value.helper: Primary input: miles per gallon (US gallon). Typical range for passenger vehicles: 10–60 mpg. Used in North American fleet reporting.

fuel_type.label: Fuel Type
fuel_type.helper: Determines carbon intensity and energy content. Required for environmental loss calculations per ISO 14067.

driving_cycle.label: Driving Cycle
driving_cycle.helper: Affects real-world efficiency deviation. Used in Six Sigma process capability analysis for fleet variance.

annual_mileage.label: Annual Mileage
annual_mileage.helper: Used to compute total fuel consumption, cost, and emissions. Typical fleet vehicle: 10k–30k miles/year.

fuel_price_per_gallon.label: Fuel Price per Gallon
fuel_price_per_gallon.helper: Local fuel cost for total cost of ownership (TCO) analysis. Input for Lean cost reduction projects.

co2_per_gallon.label: CO₂ per Gallon
co2_per_gallon.helper: Default for gasoline: 8.887 kg CO₂/gallon (EPA). Used for environmental impact assessment per ISO 14064.

num_parts.label: Number of Parts in Study
num_parts.placeholder: Enter number of parts in study
num_parts.helper: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 per AIAG MSA guidelines.

num_appraisers.label: Number of Appraisers
num_appraisers.helper: Number of operators or appraisers performing measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

num_trials.label: Number of Trials per Part
num_trials.placeholder: Enter number of trials per part
num_trials.helper: Number of repeated measurements per part per appraiser, typically 2-3.

total_variation.label: Total Observed Variation (Std Dev)
total_variation.helper: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

repeatability_variation.label: Repeatability Variation (Std Dev)
repeatability_variation.helper: Variation due to equipment (same operator, same part, repeated measurements).

reproducibility_variation.label: Reproducibility Variation (Std Dev)
reproducibility_variation.helper: Variation due to different operators measuring the same part.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect (Internal)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

cost_per_escaped_defect.label: Cost per Escaped Defect (External)
cost_per_escaped_defect.helper: Average cost when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced per year for the measured characteristic.

defect_rate.label: Current Defect Rate (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts per million non-conforming based on current measurement system.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (False Positives/Negatives)
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, calculates costs from misclassifications due to measurement error.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Multiple Regression.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Multiple Regression.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Multiple Regression.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Multiply Decimals.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Multiply Decimals.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Multiply Fractions.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Multiply Fractions.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Need Based Aid.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Need Based Aid.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Need Based Aid.

num_workers_exposed.label: Number of workers exposed
num_workers_exposed.helper: Total headcount in the noise/vibration zone (e.g., assembly line, press shop).

avg_daily_exposure_hours.label: Average daily exposure hours
avg_daily_exposure_hours.helper: Per worker, typical shift duration in the affected area.

noise_level_dba.label: Noise level (A-weighted)
noise_level_dba.helper: Measured at operator position per ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) is typical action level.

vibration_level_ms2.label: Vibration level (RMS acceleration)
vibration_level_ms2.helper: Weighted acceleration per ISO 2631-1. Hand-arm or whole-body.

machine_runtime_hours_per_day.label: Machine runtime per day
machine_runtime_hours_per_day.helper: Total operating hours of the primary noise/vibration source.

maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.label: Annual maintenance cost per machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.placeholder: Enter annual maintenance cost per machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.helper: Current average spend on repairs and parts for each affected machine.

number_of_machines.label: Number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.placeholder: Enter number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.helper: Count of equipment generating noise/vibration in the assessed area.

avg_worker_annual_salary.label: Average worker annual salary (fully loaded)

weeks_per_year.label: Weeks per Year (operating)
weeks_per_year.helper: Number of weeks per year the operation runs (typically 52 for continuous, 50 for seasonal).

risk_multiplier.label: Overtime Risk Multiplier

use_lean_standardization.helper: If true, applies lean waste reduction factor (e.g., 5% reduction in labor and material).

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead Percentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Overhead as percentage of direct costs (ISO 9001 cost accounting).

quality_rework_cost.label: Quality Rework Cost
quality_rework_cost.helper: Cost of rework due to non-conformance (Six Sigma DMAIC).

schedule_delay_penalty.label: Schedule Delay Penalty
schedule_delay_penalty.helper: Penalties incurred due to late delivery (Lean just-in-time).

waste_factor.label: Waste Factor (Lean Muda)
waste_factor.helper: Estimated waste as percentage of total direct costs (Lean manufacturing).

labor_efficiency_index.label: Labor Efficiency Index (LEI)
labor_efficiency_index.helper: Ratio of standard labor hours to actual labor hours (WERC DC metrics).

material_price_variance.label: Material Price Variance
material_price_variance.helper: Difference between standard and actual material prices.

scope_change_cost.label: Scope Change Cost
scope_change_cost.helper: Additional costs from unapproved scope changes.

inventory_holding_cost.label: Inventory Holding Cost
inventory_holding_cost.helper: Cost of carrying excess inventory (WERC warehousing).

currency_exchange_loss.label: Currency Exchange Loss
currency_exchange_loss.helper: Loss due to unfavorable exchange rate fluctuations.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of subcontractor contract influences margin risk.

use_lean_accounting.label: Use Lean Accounting Adjustments
use_lean_accounting.helper: Apply Lean accounting principles to value stream costing.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Subjective Well Being.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Subjective Well Being.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Subjective Well Being.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Subtract Decimals.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Subtract Decimals.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Subtract Decimals.

primary_value.label: Primary value
primary_value.helper: Primary input for Subtract Fractions.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Subtract Fractions.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Subtract Fractions.

asset_cost.label: Asset Cost
asset_cost.helper: Total cost of the asset including purchase price and any directly attributable costs.

salvage_value.label: Salvage Value
salvage_value.helper: Estimated residual value of the asset at the end of its useful life.

useful_life.label: Useful Life (years)
useful_life.helper: Number of years the asset is expected to be used in operations.

current_year.label: Current Year of Depreciation
current_year.helper: The specific year (1 to useful life) for which depreciation is being calculated.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Price per Unit
purchase_price.helper: Negotiated unit price from supplier contract.

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts per million defective, Six Sigma metric.

inspection_cost_per_unit.label: Inspection Cost per Unit
inspection_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost of incoming quality inspection per unit.

freight_cost_per_unit.label: Freight Cost per Unit
freight_cost_per_unit.helper: Average shipping cost per unit from supplier.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Time (days)
lead_time_days.helper: Supplier lead time from order to delivery.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying Cost Rate
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding cost as percentage of unit cost (Lean metric).

warranty_claim_rate.label: Warranty Claim Rate
warranty_claim_rate.helper: Percentage of units that result in warranty claims.

average_claim_cost.label: Average Warranty Claim Cost
average_claim_cost.helper: Average cost per warranty claim (labor, parts, logistics).

supplier_quality_level.label: Supplier Quality Level
supplier_quality_level.helper: Qualitative assessment of supplier quality management system (ISO 9001).

use_eco_cost.label: Include Environmental Cost
use_eco_cost.helper: Toggle to include estimated carbon and waste disposal costs (ISO 14040).

co2_per_unit.label: CO2 Emissions per Unit
co2_per_unit.helper: Estimated carbon footprint per unit from supplier operations.

carbon_tax_rate.label: Carbon Tax Rate
carbon_tax_rate.helper: Applicable carbon tax or internal carbon price.

supplier_reliability_score.label: Supplier Reliability Score (0-100)
supplier_reliability_score.helper: Historical on-time delivery and quality performance of key suppliers. Higher score indicates better reliability.

inventory_buffer_days.label: Inventory Buffer (Days of Cover)
inventory_buffer_days.helper: Average days of inventory held to absorb demand or supply shocks. Based on lean inventory principles.

lead_time_variability.label: Lead Time Variability (Coefficient of Variation)
lead_time_variability.placeholder: Enter lead time variability (coefficient of variation)
lead_time_variability.helper: Standard deviation of lead time divided by mean lead time. Higher values indicate unpredictable supply.

single_source_dependency.label: Single Source Dependency (0-100%)
single_source_dependency.helper: Percentage of critical components sourced from a single supplier. High dependency increases risk.

geopolitical_risk_index.label: Geopolitical Risk Index (0-100)
geopolitical_risk_index.helper: Composite index of political instability, trade restrictions, and regional conflicts affecting supply chain.

demand_volatility.label: Demand Volatility (Coefficient of Variation)
demand_volatility.helper: Variability in customer demand over time. High volatility strains capacity and inventory.

transportation_disruption_probability.label: Transportation Disruption Probability (0-1)
transportation_disruption_probability.helper: Estimated likelihood of a major transportation disruption (port closure, strike, etc.) in the next quarter.

quality_defect_rate.label: Quality Defect Rate (ppm)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Parts per million defective from incoming inspection. Six Sigma target is < 3.4 ppm.

cyber_risk_score.label: Cyber Risk Score (0-100)
cyber_risk_score.helper: Assessment of cybersecurity vulnerabilities in supply chain IT systems. Higher score indicates higher risk.

use_advanced_hedging.label: Enable Advanced Hedging Strategies
use_advanced_hedging.helper: If true, applies financial and operational hedging models to mitigate currency and commodity risks.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Survival Analysis.

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Survival Analysis.

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Swimming Critical Swim Speed.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Swimming Stroke Rate.

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Swimming Stroke Rate.

primary_value.helper: Primary input for System of Equations.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for System of Equations.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for System of Equations.

target_value.label: Target Value (T)
target_value.helper: The ideal nominal specification for the product characteristic (e.g., length, weight, voltage).

lower_spec_limit.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lower_spec_limit.helper: Minimum acceptable value per engineering or customer requirement.

upper_spec_limit.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
upper_spec_limit.helper: Maximum acceptable value per engineering or customer requirement.

process_mean.label: Process Mean (μ)
process_mean.helper: Current average of the process output.

cost_at_limit.label: Cost at Specification Limit (A₀)
cost_at_limit.helper: Estimated financial loss (rework, scrap, warranty) when a unit is exactly at the specification limit.

deviation_at_limit.label: Deviation at Limit (Δ)
deviation_at_limit.helper: Distance from target to the nearest specification limit (Δ = min(T-LSL, USL-T)).

production_volume.label: Production Volume (N)
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the period.

inspection_rate.label: Inspection Rate (%)
inspection_rate.helper: Percentage of units inspected. Used to adjust hidden loss estimates.

loss_function_type.label: Loss Function Type
loss_function_type.helper: Type of quality characteristic: nominal-is-best (target), smaller-is-better (e.g., impurities), larger-is-better (e.g., strength).

include_hidden_factory.label: Include Hidden Factory Losses
include_hidden_factory.helper: If true, adds estimated losses from rework, inspection, and scrap that are not captured by the basic loss function.

available_work_time_seconds.label: Available Work Time per Shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.placeholder: Enter available work time per shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.helper: Total planned production time per shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.

customer_demand_per_shift.label: Customer Demand per Shift (units)
customer_demand_per_shift.helper: Number of units required by the customer per shift.

cycle_time_seconds.label: Actual Cycle Time (seconds)
cycle_time_seconds.helper: Measured average time to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck operation.

changeover_time_minutes.label: Average Changeover Time (minutes)
changeover_time_minutes.helper: Time required to switch from one product variant to another, including setup and adjustments.

batch_size.label: Average Batch Size (units)
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor Cost per Hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Enter direct labor cost per hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production operators.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead Rate (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., supervision, utilities, maintenance).

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; used to quantify demand uncertainty.

flexibility_strategy.label: Flexibility Strategy
flexibility_strategy.helper: Production strategy to handle demand variability: mixed-model (quick changeovers), dedicated lines (fixed product lines), chase demand (vary capacity), or level schedule (stable production with inventory).

primary_value.helper: Primary input for Tankless Water Heater.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value
secondary_value.helper: Secondary input for Tankless Water Heater.

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Tankless Water Heater.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

production_volume_meters.helper: Total fabric produced per month, used as baseline for waste ratio calculations.

fabric_type.helper: Different fabric types have distinct waste generation profiles and recycling potential.

waste_percentage.label: Current Waste Percentage (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Measured waste as a percentage of total production, including cutting, sewing, and finishing losses.

rework_rate.label: Rework Rate (%)
rework_rate.helper: Percentage of products requiring rework, a key Lean Six Sigma metric for process efficiency.

defect_density.label: Defect Density (defects per 1000 meters)
defect_density.helper: Number of defects per 1000 meters of fabric, critical for quality control.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Energy Cost ($/kWh)
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average electricity cost, used to calculate energy waste from inefficient processes.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Cost ($/hour)
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage, used to quantify labor waste from rework and idle time.

recycling_capability.label: Recycling Capability
recycling_capability.helper: Current ability to recycle waste fabric, affecting waste disposal cost and environmental impact.

iso_14001_certified.label: ISO 14001 Certified
iso_14001_certified.helper: Indicates if the facility has ISO 14001 environmental management certification, influencing waste reduction practices.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Thrust to Weight Ratio.

observed_time.helper: Average cycle time recorded during direct observation, excluding any abnormal delays.

performance_rating.label: Performance Rating (%)
performance_rating.helper: Operator pace relative to normal (100% = standard pace). Based on Westinghouse or similar rating system.

allowance_percentage.label: Allowance Percentage (%)
allowance_percentage.helper: Total allowance for fatigue, personal needs, and unavoidable delays (ISO 9001 / ILO guidelines).

frequency_per_cycle.label: Frequency per Cycle
frequency_per_cycle.helper: How many times the observed element occurs per complete work cycle (e.g., 2 inspections per assembly).

work_measurement_method.label: Work Measurement Method
work_measurement_method.helper: The technique used to obtain the observed time; affects confidence and adjustment factors.

include_learning_curve.label: Include Learning Curve Adjustment
include_learning_curve.helper: If true, applies a learning curve factor (80% slope) for new or changed processes.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Time Zone Converter.

tertiary_value.label: Tertiary value
tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Total Cholesterol.

purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for acquiring the asset (ISO 15663 lifecycle costing).

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Energy Cost
annual_energy_cost.helper: Yearly electricity, fuel, or other energy consumption costs (Lean energy efficiency).

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Planned and unplanned maintenance expenses (Six Sigma reliability).

annual_labor_cost.label: Annual Labor Cost
annual_labor_cost.helper: Operator and technician wages directly attributable to the asset (WERC DC metrics).

annual_consumables_cost.label: Annual Consumables Cost
annual_consumables_cost.helper: Filters, lubricants, spare parts, and other recurring supplies.

useful_life_years.label: Useful Life (Years)
useful_life_years.helper: Expected operational lifespan per ISO 15663 or manufacturer specification.

salvage_value.label: Salvage Value
salvage_value.helper: Residual value at end of useful life (accounting standard).

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (%)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital or hurdle rate for NPV calculation.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Rate (%)
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation for future cost escalation.

utilization_hours_per_year.label: Utilization Hours per Year
utilization_hours_per_year.helper: Actual operating hours per year (OEE availability).

downtime_cost_per_hour.label: Downtime Cost per Hour
downtime_cost_per_hour.helper: Lost revenue or penalty cost per hour of unplanned downtime.

expected_downtime_hours_per_year.label: Expected Downtime Hours per Year
expected_downtime_hours_per_year.placeholder: Enter expected downtime hours per year

training_cost_per_operator.label: Training Cost per Operator
training_cost_per_operator.helper: Initial and recurring training cost per operator (Lean skill matrix).

number_of_operators.label: Number of Operators
number_of_operators.helper: Direct operators assigned to the asset.

environmental_compliance_cost_per_year.label: Environmental Compliance Cost per Year
environmental_compliance_cost_per_year.placeholder: Enter environmental compliance cost per year

asset_type.label: Asset Type
asset_type.helper: Category influences depreciation method and maintenance factors.

depreciation_method.helper: Accounting method for annual depreciation expense.

include_downtime.helper: Toggle to include or exclude downtime-related costs in TCO.

market_price_per_unit.label: Market Price per Unit (USD)
market_price_per_unit.helper: Arm's length market price for comparable uncontrolled transactions.

volume_units.label: Transaction Volume (units)
volume_units.helper: Total number of units transferred between entities in the period.

tax_rate_producer.label: Producer Entity Tax Rate (%)
tax_rate_producer.helper: Effective corporate tax rate of the producing entity's jurisdiction.

tax_rate_distributor.label: Distributor Entity Tax Rate (%)
tax_rate_distributor.helper: Effective corporate tax rate of the distributing entity's jurisdiction.

transfer_price_current.label: Current Transfer Price (USD)
transfer_price_current.helper: Existing transfer price used for intercompany transactions.

compliance_risk_tolerance.label: Compliance Risk Tolerance (Low/Medium/High)
compliance_risk_tolerance.helper: Company's appetite for audit risk; Low = tight arm's length range, High = wider range.

include_lean_waste_factor.label: Include Lean Waste Factor
include_lean_waste_factor.helper: If true, applies a waste reduction factor (muda) to production cost based on Six Sigma process capability.

secondary_value.label: Secondary value

tertiary_value.helper: Optional modifier for Transition Fit.

annual_volume.helper: Total number of units shipped per year across all modes.

avg_shipment_weight.label: Average Shipment Weight (kg)
avg_shipment_weight.helper: Average weight per shipment, used to compute freight cost and risk exposure.

distance_km.label: Average Distance per Shipment (km)
distance_km.helper: Average haul distance for each shipment, influences fuel cost and transit risk.

mode.label: Transport Mode
mode.helper: Primary mode of transport: truck, rail, ocean, air.

fuel_price_per_liter.label: Fuel Price (USD per liter)
fuel_price_per_liter.helper: Current diesel or bunker fuel price, used for variable cost estimation.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Rate (USD per hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage for drivers/operators, used in labor cost calculation.

transit_time_days.label: Transit Time (days)
transit_time_days.helper: Expected door-to-door transit time, affects inventory carrying cost and risk.

damage_rate_percent.label: Historical Damage Rate (%)
damage_rate_percent.helper: Percentage of shipments damaged in transit, based on historical data.

insurance_rate_per_1000.label: Insurance Rate (per $1000 value)
insurance_rate_per_1000.helper: Premium per $1000 of declared cargo value, used for insurance cost.

cargo_value_per_unit.label: Cargo Value per Unit (USD)
cargo_value_per_unit.helper: Average value of each shipped unit, used for risk exposure and insurance.

inventory_holding_cost_percent.label: Inventory Holding Cost (% of value per year)
inventory_holding_cost_percent.placeholder: Enter inventory holding cost (% of value per year)
inventory_holding_cost_percent.helper: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of cargo value, includes warehousing, capital cost.

standard.body: This calculation provides a preliminary assessment based on your inputs and deterministic methodology. Results do not replace quotes, investment, engineering, tax, legal, or safety decisions. For critical decisions, verify with your own data, qualified experts, and applicable regulations.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Legal terms and conditions for using SectorCalc calculators and services.

terms.heroDescription: By accessing or using SectorCalc, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to SectorCalc. By accessing or using our website and calculation tools, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

section1.title: 1. Our Services
section1.content: SectorCalc provides industrial and business calculators for informational and decision-support purposes. Our tools do not constitute professional engineering, financial, or legal advice. You are solely responsible for verifying any results before making business decisions.

section2.title: 2. Premium Features & Credits
section2.content: Premium tools require credits. Credits are non-refundable and expire 12 months after purchase. You may purchase credit packages through our secure payment provider. Unused credits do not roll over.

section3.title: 3. User Accounts
section3.content: You must create an account to access premium features. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
section4.content: All content, formulas, algorithms, designs, and trademarks are the exclusive property of Sector Calculator (operating as SectorCalc). You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written permission.

section5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
section5.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Sector Calculator shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.

section6.title: 6. Modifications
section6.content: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

section7.title: 7. Contact Information
section7.content: For questions about these Terms, contact us using the details below.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How SectorCalc collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

privacy.heroDescription: What data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect personal information you provide (e.g., email address when you register). We also automatically collect usage data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) to improve our tools.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use your data to operate, maintain, and improve SectorCalc, to process payments, and to communicate with you about your account or updates.

section3.title: 3. Cookies & Tracking
section3.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and optional analytics cookies (e.g., Google Analytics) to analyze usage. You can disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings.

section4.title: 4. Data Sharing
section4.content: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with trusted third-party services (payment processors — Stripe/Paddle, hosting — Vercel) as necessary to provide our services.

section5.title: 5. Data Retention & Security
section5.content: We retain your data as long as your account is active. We implement reasonable security measures, but no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at info@sectorcalc.com.

section7.title: 7. Children's Privacy
section7.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

section8.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
section8.content: We may update this policy from time to time. The "Effective" date at the top indicates when the latest version was posted.

section9.title: 9. Data Controller
section9.content: The data controller for SectorCalc is:

meta.title: Refund Policy
meta.description: Refund terms for credit purchases and subscriptions on SectorCalc.

refundPolicy.heroDescription: Refund terms for credit purchases and subscriptions.
refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro: We want you to be satisfied with your purchase. Please read this Refund Policy carefully.

section1.title: 1. Credits & Subscriptions
section1.content: Credits: Purchases of credits are final and non-refundable. Unused credits expire 12 months after purchase. No cash refunds will be issued for unused credits. Subscriptions: If you purchase a recurring subscription, you may request a full refund within 14 days of your first payment, provided you have not used any premium tool during that period. After 14 days or after first use, subscription fees are non-refundable.

section2.title: 2. Faulty or Incorrect Tools
section2.content: If a premium tool produces demonstrably incorrect results due to a bug in our system, we will refund the credits used for that calculation (up to the number of credits spent) or provide replacement credits. Please report the issue with screenshots and details to info@sectorcalc.com.

section3.title: 3. How to Request a Refund
section3.content: To request a refund, contact us at info@sectorcalc.com with your transaction ID (from your payment provider) and the reason for the request. We will respond within 7–14 business days.

section4.title: 4. Chargebacks
section4.content: If you initiate a chargeback without first contacting us, we may suspend your account until the matter is resolved.

section5.title: 5. Changes to this Policy
section5.content: We reserve the right to modify this refund policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page.

section6.title: 6. Contact Information
section6.content: For refund requests or billing questions, contact us using the details below.
